title: eBay Could Announce Decision on Crypto Payments March 10
text: As eBay moves towards reaching a wider customer base of Gen Z and millennials, it's concurrently doing a deep dive on the feasibility of integrating cryptocurrency as a payment option.  The global eCommerce marketplace is anticipated to possibly make some kind of announcement about crypto payments during its March 10 Investor Day 2022, TheStreet reported.

title: Not Your Father's Auction Site, eBay Moves Toward An Immersive Shopping Journey
text: The recommerce market has been spurred by online consumption, convenience, pricing and the simple motivation to invest in things with intrinsic value and significant appreciation potential. eBay is focused on ensuring the shopping journey is optimized for buyers and sellers.

title: eBay Tops Expectations All Around in 2021
text: E-commerce platform eBay Inc. ( EBAY , Financial) reported its latest round of earnings results on Wednesday. The company booked better-than-expected results for its fourth quarter and full year ended Dec. 31, 2021.

title: eBay Stock Blasted with Bear Notes After Dismal Forecast
text: eBay Inc  (NASDAQ:EBAY ) is sinking, last seen down 3.6% to trade at $52.52, after the e-commerce giant issued a disappointing current-quarter revenue forecast, amid cooling online demand and global supply chain challenges.

title: eBay Annual Active Buyers Decline by 9%
text: EBay's earnings results, announced after the market close on Wednesday, showed declines in low-value active buyers but gross merchandise value (GMV) was up compared to pre-pandemic levels. To that end, annual active buyers declined during the quarter, as measured year over year, to 147 million.

title: eBay Inc. Reports Better Than Expected Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2021 Results
text: SAN JOSE, Calif., Feb. 23, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- eBay Inc. (Nasdaq: EBAY), a global commerce leader that connects millions of buyers and sellers around the world, today reported financial results for its fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2021.

title: Yooma Wellness brands added to eBay CBD programme
text: Yooma Wellness Inc (CSE:YOOM, OTC:LVVEF, AQSE:YOOM) told investors that a number of its products have been added to eBay, via the e-commerce firm's invite-only CBD pilot programme. It will see fifty-one Vitality CBD product lines, five of Blossom Skincare and four of MYO CBD made available for purchase via eBay's platform.

title: This 35-year-old mom quit her job to work on her eBay side hustle full-time—and made $141 million in sales last year
text: In 2011, Tori Gerbig started a side hustle selling clothes on eBay. As the business grew, she quit her job and turned it into a full-time online clothing business, called Pink Lily.
